phaseHistory.name: Resolve Repos + Create Worktrees + Preflight + Load Shared Context
phaseHistory.notes: Worktree-add intentionally skipped: already inside Claude Code worktree.

phaseHistory.name: Implement
phaseHistory.notes: 3 task-implementer agents in parallel; 3 sequential commits.

phaseHistory.name: Verify (Reflect + Review)
phaseHistory.notes: First pass: 6 reviewers. 3 Critical + 9 Major + 8 Minor consolidated, fixed in 835bf46. Re-verify (Step D): 5 reviewers, all original C+M resolved; surfaced 1 C1 continuation + 3 minors, fixed in fd93726. No user-facing questions; no halts.

phaseHistory.name: PR Cleanup & CI
phaseHistory.notes: Diff clean (no TODOs/debug markers); commit history follows convention; PR MERGEABLE/CLEAN; no CI configured (markdown-only repo).

phaseHistory.name: Canary Deploy
phaseHistory.notes: Skipped: requirement.md frontmatter declares deployable: false.

phaseHistory.name: Wrapup and Merge
phaseHistory.notes: Squash-merged PR #22 at 96b54ee. Worktree cleanup followed (force-removed bookkeeping mod, deleted local branch). LESSON-003 captured pre-merge (commit 55c4e8d). Final state file written directly to main as post-wrapup commit since /proceed Phase 8 fires after squash-merge.
